# Backlog Item

- Backlog Item ID: `CR-001`
- Title: `Enforce contract change approval workflow`
- Persona/Actor: `Maintainer`
- Value statement: `For maintainers, deliver explicit contract change governance to achieve compatibility and controlled evolution.`
- Context: `Any change touching schema/interface/config contracts in project modules.`
- Problem statement: `Unreviewed breaking contract changes can invalidate content, routes, and future integrations.`
- Expected outcome: `Breaking changes are not merged without approved ICR and migration notes.`
- Success metric(s): `0 unapproved breaking contract changes merged to main.`
- Acceptance criteria (behavior):
  - `A documented ICR is linked for every breaking contract change.`
  - `Migration notes are attached in PR when compatibility is impacted.`
  - `Reviewers can trace contract decisions to backlog and requirements artifacts.`
- Non-goals: `Automated semantic diff tooling for all contract types in Phase 1.`
- Constraints: `Must follow governance defined in project and generic instructions.`
- Dependencies: `Template availability for ICR, reviewer ownership clarity.`
- Risks/assumptions: `Assumes maintainers consistently classify additive vs breaking changes.`
- Validation approach: `PR review checklist and periodic audit of merged contract changes.`
- Priority score: `88`
- Target window: `Phase 1`
- Links:
  - Requirement entry: `requirements-log.md#CR-001`
  - ADR: `adr/0003-extension-through-seams.md`
  - ICR: `n/a`
  - PR/changeset: `n/a`
